issues.title: Damage spike on floor 1 encounter 1
issues.description: Enemy dealt 21 damage when player had 41 HP (51.2% of current HP). This exceeds the 50% threshold.
reproductionSteps: Start run with seed 300, profile story-beginner

issues.title: Player defeated on floor 1

issues.title: Unfun HP swing in floor 1 encounter 1
issues.description: Player HP dropped from 73 (>56=70% of 80) to 0 (<16=20% of 80) within a single encounter. This kind of swing feels punishing and unfun.
reproductionSteps: Start run with seed 300, profile story-beginner
Observe dramatic HP loss during encounter

issues.title: Card type "wild" never played
issues.description: The "wild" card type was never used during this playthrough. This may indicate the card type is unavailable, underpowered, or the player's deck/archetype doesn't include it.
reproductionSteps: Start run with seed 300, profile story-beginner
Monitor card type distribution during run
Check if "wild" cards appear in deck
